summary: ITERATION 1 - TEST PHASE: v1.1 development progressing. Enhanced VoiceRecorder testing (69.87% coverage), added comprehensive Header (100%), PostCard (76.31%), and CommentSection (61.9%) tests. Overall frontend test coverage improved from 57% to 72.75%. 232 tests passing. VoiceRecorder and emotion trends chart components fully implemented with audio recording and ML sentiment analysis capabilities.

v1_0_status.notes: v1.0 MVP fully implemented with all core features complete

completed_features: ✅ VoiceRecorder 組件（Web Audio API + Web Speech API）
✅ PostComposer 集成語音輸入（含轉錄回調）
✅ EmotionTrendsChart 組件（心情分布、時間線、統計）
✅ Sidebar 導航更新（新增 Trends 連結）
✅ 單元測試針對新組件和現有組件
in_progress: 🧪 提升測試覆蓋率至 80% 目標
pending: 🔧 補充 Feed 和 PostDetail 頁面測試
📱 深色模式和主題切換完整優化
